query:
INSERT INTO map_pins (sheetId, title, notes, positionX, positionY, category, photos)
VALUES 
(
  1,
  'Fiber Optic — Property Entrance Splice Point',
  'Underground fiber optic conduit entry point at Bear Cove Rd property entrance.\n\n**Installed:** 2024\n**Type:** Single-mode fiber in conduit\n\nThis is where the fiber transitions from the public road right-of-way into the property private conduit system. The conduit runs underground from here to the main house cluster.\n\nSee the orange "Fiber Optic Conduit" route line for the full path.',
  15.0,
  85.0,
  'electrical',
  '[]'
),
(
  1,
  'Fiber Optic — Main House Termination',
  'Fiber optic conduit termination point at the main house / main building cluster.\n\n**Installed:** 2024\n**Service:** High-speed internet via fiber to the premises (FTTP)\n\nThe fiber conduit arrives here from the entrance splice point (see orange route line). Connection equipment and patch panel located inside the main house.',
  78.0,
  18.0,
  'electrical',
  '[]'
);
